speaker: speaker1
text: What kind of gas does this car take ?

speaker: speaker2
text: I don't know . It's a rental .

speaker: speaker1
text: I will give you premium unleaded . Alright ?

speaker: speaker1
text: That is the pump you are in front of .

speaker: speaker2
text: Well , I don't want it then . Can I move to another pump ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Yes , I can give you regular unleaded . But you have to back up the car a little .

speaker: speaker2
text: Give me regular unleaded then . I will back up.Can you wash my windows for me ?

speaker: speaker1
text: I'm sorry , sir . This is not a full service gas station . I will help you fill the gas , but we don't wash windows here .

speaker: speaker2
text: Really ? Well , I guess I have to get used to it .
